messages.body: $LASE broooo 🙊🙊🙊🙊🙊😂😂😂😂😂😂

$LASE DEAR STUPID 
LASE shareholders need to understand what this DEF 14A is. 
 
This filing is a PROXY STATEMENT asking shareholders to vote on warrant-related proposals. It is NOT an ATM filing and it does NOT mean shares are being dumped into the market today. 
 
The big issue is warrant overhang. If approved, certain warrant holders could eventually acquire additional shares, which creates future dilution risk. That's why traders are reacting. 
 
What it does NOT show is an active ATM selling stock into today's rally. 
 
The after-hours drop appears to be the market repricing dilution risk, profit-taking after a huge run, and shorts leaning on the warrant narrative. 
 
Key date: June 26 shareholder vote. 
 
Until then, watch the SEC filings and company updates carefully. The market is trading the possibility of future dilution, not confirmed ATM dilution happening right now. 
 
Not financial advice. Read the filing yourself and verify everything.  
 
https://www.sec.gov/ix?doc=/Archives/edgar/data/0001807887/000149315226027109/formdef14a.htm

data.text:
DEAR STUPID 
LASE shareholders need to understand what this DEF 14A is. 
 
This filing is a PROXY STATEMENT asking shareholders to vote on warrant-related proposals. It is NOT an ATM filing and it does NOT mean shares are being dumped into the market today. 
 
The big issue is warrant overhang. If approved, certain warrant holders could eventually acquire additional shares, which creates future dilution risk. That's why traders are reacting. 
 
What it does NOT show is an active ATM selling stock into today's rally. 
 
The after-hours drop appears to be the market repricing dilution risk, profit-taking after a huge run, and shorts leaning on the warrant narrative. 
 
Key date: June 26 shareholder vote. 
 
Until then, watch the SEC filings and company updates carefully. The market is trading the possibility of future dilution, not confirmed ATM dilution happening right now. 
 
Not financial advice. Read the filing yourself and verify everything.
